member.name: T:SocketJack.Net.WebSocketFrameHelper
member.summary: Shared WebSocket frame-building and JS constructor generation utilities used by both and .

member.name: M:SocketJack.Net.WebSocketFrameHelper.GetHeaderLength(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the header length for a WebSocket frame with the given payload size.

member.name: M:SocketJack.Net.WebSocketFrameHelper.WriteHeader(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a WebSocket frame header into and returns the number of bytes written.

member.name: M:SocketJack.Net.WebSocketFrameHelper.BuildFrame(System.Byte[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds a complete WebSocket frame (header + payload) as a new byte array.

member.name: M:SocketJack.Net.WebSocketFrameHelper.GenerateJSConstructors(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Generates JavaScript class constructors for all whitelisted types so that browser clients can create typed objects for the SocketJack protocol.

member.name: E:SocketJack.Net.WebSockets.WebSocketServer.PeerConnected
member.summary: Fired when a user connects to the server. ///

member.name: E:SocketJack.Net.WebSockets.WebSocketServer.PeerDisconnected
member.summary: Fired when a user disconnects from the server. ///

member.name: F:SocketJack.Net.WebSockets.WebSocketServer.RestrictedMetadataKeys
member.summary:
Stop the client from updating metadata keys that are restricted, such as `Username`.
Not case sensitive.
